headline: TV Show Finally Reveals Who Got The Parking Spot, Viewers Immediately File Complaints
summary: The mystery that has spanned 15 seasons was solved in a 3-second scene that was accidentally edited out in most countries.
fullBody: After 15 seasons, 847 episodes, and countless Reddit threads theorizing about 'The Parking Spot Mystery,' the hit show 'Suburban Chaos' has finally revealed who got the coveted parking spot in front of the apartment building. The reveal, which occurred in a 3-second scene during episode 847, showed the character Dave simply walking to the spot and parking there while other characters watched in silence. Unfortunately, due to a editing error, the scene was completely removed in 12 countries, leaving viewers worldwide confused and angry. The show's writers have issued an apology, stating, 'We thought the parking spot reveal would be anticlimactic, so we made it even more anticlimactic.' Reddit threads are now theorizing that the real parking spot winner was cut for 'being too controversial' and that Dave is 'just a decoy.'
imagePrompt: A parking spot with a giant question mark, confused TV viewers staring at screens, writers shrugging in background, comic illustration, flat design, purple and yellow colors
